html:
Exclusive to:

HotWarmLukewarmCold

“Gains heat when near something hot, and cools near something cold.

It will warm the holder depending on its temperature.

When hot, it chops a bit more efficiently, and does extra damage towards freezing targets.

Durability is used when breaking from cooling down fully, it can be mended back into a functional state by heating it back up again.”

-

The Ardent Axe is a Tool that can be used to chop down Trees. It can be crafted at an Alchemy Engine using four Twigs, two uncooked Heat Glands, and three Nitre.

The Ardent Axe has an internal temperature from 0 to 90 degree. When crafted, it starts with 90 degree. Like a Thermal Stone, it can be heated up near heat sources or be cooled down near cool sources. When it is cold or lukewarm, it chops trees with the same efficiency as normal Axe. When it is Warm, it chops with 25% more efficiency, and when it is Hot, it chops 50% more efficiency, cutting down a stage 3 Tree in ten swings instead of fifteen.

Stage Temperature Bonus Efficiency
Cold ≤ 20 1x
Lukewarm 20–40 1x
Warm 40–60 1.25x
Hot > 60 1.5x

The Ardent Axe passively heats the holder, like a Thermal Stone, and glows when it is warm or hot. Each chop or attack transfers a small amount of heat from the axe to the wielder, which can cause Overheating.

The Ardent Axe does not lose durability from use. Instead, it loses 25% durability when it becomes too cold. When the temperature drops below 0 degree, the Ardent Axe becomes "broken" state and cannot be equipped. It can be repaired by heating it up to above 60 degree before it can be used again.

The Ardent Axe does extra damage towards freezing targets, up to double damage towards targets not frozen solid, and triple damage against a target that's frozen solid. As usual, striking a frozen-solid target will instantly thaw them out.

Stage Freezing Frozen
Cold / Lukewarm 1× 1×
Warm 1.25× 1.5×
Hot 2× 3×

Trivia

  • The Ardent Axe was called the "Thermic Axe" during the beta.
  • The Ardent Axe is added in Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update.

Assets

  • Stage 3
  • Stage 2
  • Cooled Down

Exclusive to:
HotWarmLukewarmCold
“It's a hot commodity.”
–Wilson
“I like my tools scalding hot.”
–Willow
“Hot axe make Wolfgang feel the burn!”
–Wolfgang
“The hottest flames burn out the quickest...”
–Wendy
“SUPERHEATED FOR MAXIMUM EFFICIENCY”
–WX-78
“It helps perform tasks quickly, if one can withstand the heat.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's hot stuff, but I promise it doesn't hold a candle to you, Lucy!”
–Woodie
“I despise working up a sweat...”
–Maxwell
“It still bears the heat öf the förge!”
–Wigfrid
“It singes the hairs on our fingies!”
–Webber
“It cuts through trees like a hot knife through butter!”
–Warly
“Ah! Hot!!”
–Wormwood
“Anybody got some safety gloves?”
–Winona
“Its heat can't be beat.”
–Wortox
“It good chopper, but hurt claws!”
–Wurt
“Wow, I can feel the heat from here!”
–Walter
“Incredibly hot, but wonderfully efficient!”
–Wanda
“It's all warmed up!”
–Wilson
“I'm never using any other axe ever again.”
–Willow
“Is good at keeping Wolfgang nice and warm.”
–Wolfgang
“I can find some small comfort in its warmth.”
–Wendy
“AN AXE AND A HEATER. I RESPECT A MULTITASKER”
–WX-78
“It keeps its user comfortably warm while working.”
–Wickerbottom
“I'm sorry, Lucy! It was freezin' out!”
–Woodie
“If I must do physical labor, I can at least do it in relative comfort.”
–Maxwell
“It öffers respite fröm the cöld.”
–Wigfrid
“It keeps us warm while we do our chores.”
–Webber
“It keeps my hands pleasantly warm.”
–Warly
“Warm chopper”
–Wormwood
“Nothin' warms you up like some hard work.”
–Winona
“It keeps the cold from taking hold.”
–Wortox
“So warm! Gimme!”
–Wurt
“It'll keep me warm while I chop wood!”
–Walter
“It makes the work nice and cozy.”
–Wanda
“I think it's losing steam.”
–Wilson
“Awwwww, where did all that beautiful heat go?”
–Willow
“Is cooled off now.”
–Wolfgang
“It has lost the warmth it once had.”
–Wendy
“HEAT OUTPUT: NEGLIGIBLE”
–WX-78
“Its temperature has diminished significantly.”
–Wickerbottom
“Fizzled out, eh?”
–Woodie
“Without heat, it's hardly different from an ordinary axe.”
–Maxwell
“The fire burns löw within it.”
–Wigfrid
“Aww, where did the heat go?”
–Webber
“It's getting cold.”
–Warly
“No more warm?”
–Wormwood
“It's coolin' off.”
–Winona
“What's the harm? It's barely warm!”
–Wortox
“Hey! How come not warm anymore?”
–Wurt
“It's barely warm.”
–Walter
“It's barely warm.”
–Wanda
“It's cold and brittle.”
–Wilson
“It's not looking so good...”
–Willow
“Is cracking apart.”
–Wolfgang
“It's not long for this world...”
–Wendy
“WARNING: LOSING STRUCTURAL INTEGRITY”
–WX-78
“It may require repairs soon.”
–Wickerbottom
“Looks like it's aboot to break apart. Luce... are you smiling?”
–Woodie
“It won't hold together much longer.”
–Maxwell
“It shall nöt weather much further use.”
–Wigfrid
“Uh-oh... is it gonna break?”
–Webber
“It's beginning to crumble.”
–Warly
“Going to break!”
–Wormwood
“It's lookin' a little flimsy.”
–Winona
“The cracks are beginning to show, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“It gonna break, florp!”
–Wurt
“Uh oh. Looks like it's about to break...”
–Walter
“Its time is nearly up.”
–Wanda

When hot, it chops a bit more efficiently, and does extra damage towards freezing targets.
Durability is used when breaking from cooling down fully, it can be mended back into a functional state by heating it back up again.”

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Rìu lửa là một Công cụ có thể được sử dụng để chặt cây. Nó có thể được chế tạo tại Máy luyện kim bằng cách sử dụng bốn Cành Cây, hai Tuyến Nhiệt chưa nấu chín và ba Tiêu Nitre.
